Leeds Disston; 510-835-8110; appearing as counsel for plaintiff and cross-defendant Benita Chiu.
Duy Thai; 415-296-9927; appearing as counsel for defendant and cross-complainant Charles Li.

Mr. Thai contests the court's tentative ruling. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

CROSS-DEFENDANT BENITA CHIU'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED CROSS-COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. The demurrer to the UCL cause of action is sustained without leave to amend. Cross-Complainant fails to allege a business practice that caused loss of money or property giving rise to any available remedy under UCL. Demurrer is otherwise overruled. Causes of action for conspiracy/aiding and abetting fraudulent conveyance are sufficiently stated.
